items.title: Boeing’s 777x Takes a Step Ahead, Report Says. What It Means for the Stock.
items.description: Boeing’s 777x Takes a Step Ahead, Report Says. What It Means for the Stock.

items.title: Salient Motion to Showcase Commercial and Military Actuation Systems with Boeing Ventures at Dubai Airshow 2025
items.description: TORRANCE, Calif. & DUBAI, United Arab Emirates, November 11, 2025--(Dubai Airshow)—Salient Motion, an aerospace and defense component supplier, will showcase its modular actuation systems and motion control technologies at Dubai Airshow 2025, running Nov. 17-21.

items.title: History Says Europe's Big 3-Way Space Merger Will Fail
items.description: Europe's space companies will cease competing with each other and combine to take on SpaceX instead. What are their chances of winning?

items.title: Airlines warn flight cancellations will continue even after shutdown ends
items.description: Airlines will need time to adjust schedules even after the shutdown ends, carriers warned.
